lastSession.summary: Built full landing page (Next.js 16 + Tailwind), deployed to Vercel, SEO schema, GIF optimized to video

backlog.title: Google Search Console setup
backlog.desc: Add verification token to layout.tsx metadata.verification.google, submit sitemap at https://www.aikrpan.com/sitemap.xml

backlog.title: OG / social share image
backlog.desc: Create 1200x630 og-image.png and place in /public. Referenced in layout.tsx metadata already.

backlog.title: Connect custom domain aikrpan.com to Vercel
backlog.desc: Vercel → Settings → Domains → add aikrpan.com and www.aikrpan.com. Update DNS at registrar.

backlog.title: Add analytics
backlog.desc: Vercel Analytics or Google Analytics. Skip for now.

shipped: All 10 sections: Nav, Hero, Marquee, About, VideoDemo, Models, Pricing, Testimonials, FAQ, CTA, Footer
SEO: 6x JSON-LD schema, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, canonical, hreflang, OG, Twitter
